label: Cashflow Pak
blurb: Advanced Financial Ops & Procurement. Working capital optimization and audit defense.

skills.label: Expense Policy Violator Flag
skills.method: Rejects $400 steak dinners that violate the $75 per diem rule, auto-notifies employee to amend.
trigger_examples: enforces corporate budgets without humans playing bad cop

skills.label: Dunning Campaign Manager
skills.method: Sends escalating but polite payment reminders for invoices 30, 60, and 90 days past due.

skills.label: Invoice Discrepancy Negotiator
skills.method: Drafts emails to vendors when line items or quantities don't match the original Purchase Order.
trigger_examples: protects cash flow from vendor errors

skills.label: Saas Spend Auditor
skills.method: Cross-references Okta active logins with Expensify/Brex to find unused, recurring software seats.
trigger_examples: instantly cuts 10-20% of shadow it spend

skills.label: Procurement Rfq Scorer
skills.method: Extracts pricing, SLAs, and terms from 10 different vendor bids and builds a side-by-side comparison matrix.

skills.label: Cash Flow Forecaster
skills.method: Pulls AR/AP from NetSuite to project bank balances 30, 60, and 90 days out based on payment history.
trigger_examples: replaces the cfo's messiest excel sheet

skills.label: Grant Compliance Tracker
skills.method: Tags expenses to specific non-profit/academic grant codes to ensure strict fund accounting.
trigger_examples: prevents organizations from losing federal funding

skills.label: Currency Fx Hedger
skills.method: Alerts the finance team when Euro/USD deviations exceed 5%, suggesting forward contracts.

skills.label: Transfer Pricing Documenter
skills.method: Generates intercompany transaction logs to comply with complex international tax law.
trigger_examples: saves hundreds of billable hours from big 4 accounting firms
